heading: Agency terminations
label: 3503 Agency terminations
notes: CodificationIn subsec. (a), “” substituted for “the effective date of this chapter” pursuant to , set out as an Effective Date note under .May 4, 1980section 601 of Pub. L. 96–88section 3401 of this title

Amendments1985—Subsec. (a). struck out par. (1) designation and par. (2) which provided for termination of Office of Dependents’ Education of Department of Defense whenever President exercises authority under .Pub. L. 99–145section 3442(a) of this title
amendments: Amendments1985—Subsec. (a). struck out par. (1) designation and par. (2) which provided for termination of Office of Dependents’ Education of Department of Defense whenever President exercises authority under .Pub. L. 99–145section 3442(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the Education Division of the Department of Health, Education, and Welfare, including the Office of Education;

children.label: B
children.text: the Office of the Assistant Secretary for Education of the Department of Health, Education, and Welfare;

children.label: C
children.text: the Bureau of Occupational and Adult Education of the Department of Health, Education, and Welfare.

children.heading: Positions authorized to be compensated at rate prescribed for level IV or V of the Executive Schedule
children.label: b Positions authorized to be compensated at rate prescribed for level IV or V of the Executive Schedule
children.text: Each position which was expressly authorized by law, or the incumbent of which was authorized to receive compensation at the rate prescribed for level IV or V of the Executive Schedule (6), in an office terminated pursuant to this chapter shall also terminate.5 U.S.C. 5315–531
